title: SQL: time with precision
poc: select tm + interval '0' second from t;
select tm + interval '0.333' second(5) from t;
key_bug_features: time precision handling in SQL operations
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE time_test (id INT PRIMARY KEY, event_time TIME(6) NOT NULL);
SELECT event_time, event_time + INTERVAL '0.123456' SECOND FROM time_test;
SELECT event_time - (SELECT MIN(event_time) FROM time_test) FROM time_test;
